title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Dorry, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Brogy as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OIMO!! Kash!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take the others and swing around the sides! Sink any ship you see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And watch out for those cannons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Roger that, Cap'n!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UBA BA BA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right, ya bastards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Fabled Giant Warrior Pirates are here! Where have they been all these years?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Countless members of their old crew have also been spotted! What do they want?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got confirmed sighting of both Brogy the Red Ogre...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RARGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: ...and DORRY the Blue Ogre!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The giant pirates have made Landfall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Blast them to smither teens!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My masters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But!!! But what're they doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Master Brogy!! Master Dorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can see OIMO and Kashi, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet they went to little garden to pick up their leaders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OIMO! Kash!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's gotta be it! Man, I was worried...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought we might not see them in Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A REFRESHER ON THE GIANT WARRIOR PIRATES

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Long ago, the world was terrorized by this formidable group led by co-captains Dorry and Brogy. Their crew would disband after they got into a certain quarrel...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy and the gang helped them out when their century-long duel came to an end. Later on, while storming a different island, they would encounter and befriend oimo and Kashi, a pair of giants who set out to check on their captains.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like they're really given' it to those Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "Ah can't believe y'all know each other!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must've come a-runnin' after hearin' the news.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh? How's that possible?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Navy marshaled a ton of manpower for this operation. It's no wonder it'd make the papers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But ah reckon the headlines must be painting' 'em in a good light.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is big news already, huh? I guess that makes sense!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
